description: Seeded randomization of whole clusters (clinics, schools, litters) to arms; the cluster is the unit of randomization and of analysis-level independence.
rules: read-only — reads a JSON spec, writes a CSV; mutates no live service
seeded — the exact schedule is reproducible from SPEC_JSON.seed
one row per cluster; uses blocking across clusters for arm balance
needs numpy + pandas; no network or GPU
usage: Set SPEC_JSON to a JSON file with keys: clusters (required list[str] of ids or int count), arms (list[str]), ratio (list[int]), block_size (int), seed (int). Output: cluster_allocation.csv under record_store.
limitation: Analyze with a method that accounts for clustering (mixed model / GEE); treating members as independent is pseudoreplication. With few clusters, balance and power are limited.
